name: Divider
description: A divider is a thin line that separates and groups content — between list items, sections of a form, or regions of a dense layout. Used sparingly, it brings order without adding weight.
keyRule: Reach for whitespace and grouping first; add a divider only where a clear boundary helps. Too many lines make a layout feel busy. Note: 'vertical' is not a `variant` value in real MUI — it's a separate `orientation` prop.

variants.name: Full-width
variants.whenToUse: `variant="fullWidth"` (real MUI default) — separate major sections edge to edge.

variants.name: Inset
variants.whenToUse: `variant="inset"` — between list items; MUI applies a fixed 72px left margin (aligned past a typical 40px avatar).

variants.name: Middle
variants.whenToUse: `variant="middle"` — indented 16px on both sides for a lighter separation.

anatomy.name: Line
anatomy.description: 1px rule in the divider colour, rendered as an <hr> by default.

anatomy.name: orientation
anatomy.description: 'horizontal' (default) or 'vertical' — a separate prop from variant, e.g. for separating inline toolbar items (pair with `flexItem` inside a flex container).

anatomy.name: children / textAlign
anatomy.description: optional text content within the divider line (e.g. "OR"), aligned via `textAlign` ('center' default, 'left', 'right').

behaviors.name: Grouping
behaviors.description: Use a divider to mark a real boundary between groups, not between every item — rows already separate visually.

behaviors.name: Inset alignment
behaviors.description: Inset dividers align with the text column so the eye reads a clean left edge.

behaviors.name: Vertical in flex layouts
behaviors.description: Set `flexItem` when using `orientation="vertical"` inside a flex container — without it, a vertical divider collapses to 0px height.

specs.value: rgba(0,0,0,.12) (semantic.color.border.default — MUI's own real default, unmodified)
72px left margin (variant="inset", MUI's built-in value, aligns past a 40px avatar)

props.name: variant
props.description: Which margin treatment to render. Default 'fullWidth'.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Default 'horizontal'. Pair vertical with flexItem inside flex containers.

props.name: flexItem
props.description: Ensures a vertical divider has correct height as a flex child. Default false.

props.name: absolute
props.description: Absolutely positions the divider. Default false.

props.name: textAlign
props.description: Alignment of optional children text within the divider line. Default 'center'.

props.name: children
props.description: Optional text/content rendered inline within the divider (e.g. "OR").

doThis: Use dividers to mark real group boundaries.
Inset to align with the content column.
Prefer spacing where it reads clearly without a line.
dontDoThis: Don't put a divider between every list row.
Don't use heavy or coloured rules for plain separation.
Don't rely on a divider to convey meaning by itself.
Don't pass 'vertical' as `variant` — it's the separate `orientation` prop.
accessibility: A purely decorative divider (default) is rendered as an <hr>, exposed to assistive tech as a separator automatically.
Never use a line as the only way to convey structure — pair with headings/labels.

related.name: List
related.why: Use the inset variant between list items

related.name: Accordion
related.why: Prefer structured grouping over long divider runs
